name: jenslaufer
description: Jens Laufer's agent plugins (Claude Code, Codex)

plugins.name: ticket
plugins.description: Turn a rough idea into a precise, well-scoped ticket and file it into a real ticketing system (GitHub Issues, Jira, GitLab, ...) through a pluggable provider layer. Use when the user wants to create, file, or push an issue/ticket into an actual system.
